text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "I'm always rooting for you!" And, "You
look so cool on the track!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wowie zowie, you've got so much fan mail, Ryan.
You're as popular as ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Me? Popular? It doesn't really feel like that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm happy to get fan mail. Reading everyone's
nice words really gets me pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It sure does. Every single letter is precious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, on to the next one...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
"Dearest Mejiro Ryan. Ever since seeing you run,
the pounding of my heart has been ceaseless."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oooh, it sounds like a love letter! How bold! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, someone as popular as you must get letters
like this every day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: N-no... That's not what this is!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But... that's the impression I get from the younger
girls sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Those are just friendly relations between older
and younger students—emphasis on friendly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! This isn't a l-l-l-love letter or anything
like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uhh, I'm gonna go for a run!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aw, she's gone... But I'm sure everyone's
expressing how they really feel in these.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's too embarrassed to read through
them all, every single fan letter gives Mejiro Ryan
more motivation.
